cases.prompt: Audit this local website, improve the visual quality, and verify it in the browser.
Make the site feel alive with tasteful animation.
Add a pinned scrubbed scroll sequence to the product story.
Add simple hover and focus polish to the pricing cards.
The project already uses framer motion. Fix the modal exit transition.
Implement this exported .lottie animation in the hero.
Use this .riv file for an interactive onboarding character.
Create a SaaS dashboard UI and keep it dense, useful, and easy to scan.
Extract a design system from these screenshots and output tokens and component states.
Redesign the existing landing page without breaking forms, routes, SEO metadata, or analytics hooks.
Create an immersive WebGL hero scene with camera motion and reduced-motion fallback.
Fix a TypeScript error in a utility function.
Improve button focus states, contrast, mobile layout, and form errors.
Add a motion budget before implementing animation changes.
Review the visual design of the existing homepage from a screenshot.
Turn this screenshot set into DESIGN.md, tokens, components, states, and accessibility notes.
Add scroll-linked accent motion, but avoid unnecessary parallax and smooth scrolling.
Build a new product landing page with truthful content and no invented proof.
Polish a CRM table view for repeated operational use.
Add an animated state machine for a checkout success illustration.
